commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Human maintainer review is needed because the PR changes model-facing tool schemas and default check automation, and the current proof is stale for the latest head.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression was found in the diff; the package file change adds a script, not dependency versions or lockfile changes. (sha=0638ed0a155c58da1cddfa4505d4c0feefc62df9)
commands.review_summary:
Adds execution-packet validation for `sessions_spawn` and cron `agentTurn` jobs, a runtime packet lint check, LOC/tsgo/dependency-ownership guardrail changes, regenerated prompt snapshots, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +192, Tests +795, Config +1, Other +681. Total +1669 across 22 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a PR adding runtime and automation guardrails, not a standalone bug report. Source inspection shows current main lacks this runtime-packet lint surface and the PR adds it in agent tool code and checks.
commands.review_followup: Human maintainer review is needed because the PR changes model-facing tool schemas and default check automation, and the current proof is stale for the latest head.

target.title: chore(agent): port audit guardrails to mainline
target.body:
## Summary
- Port the approved agent-system audit hardening onto current `origin/main`.
- Add runtime execution-packet linting for side-effectful `sessions_spawn` and cron `agentTurn` work.
- Harden self-optimization checks around LOC concurrency/baselines, tsgo invocation/resource guards, dependency ownership coverage, and prompt snapshot generation.
- Address follow-up review blockers by exempting ordinary read-only source reviews and committing regenerated prompt snapshots for the updated cron / `sessions_spawn` schemas.
- Keep LOC baseline refreshes compact and numeric so governance updates remain reviewable after rebase.

## Validation
Latest local validation was run on Windows from `D:\OpenClaw-state\worktrees\agent-system-optimization-port-20260514` after rebasing onto `origin/main` `65dd71d42deea2e7af3b18f3cdabbff517cec3b0`. Because Git HTTPS transport was unavailable during the final push, the fork branch was updated through the GitHub Git Database API; current PR head is `b331ba3d47966b8edfe45f04c3329864b3fe01b4`, whose tree `eb730bee3d8d24be7550976998f6649ff074a48b` matches the locally validated tree exactly.

- `node scripts\check-runtime-packet-lint.mjs`
- `node --import tsx scripts\generate-prompt-snapshots.ts --check`
- `NODE_PATH=D:\OpenClaw\node_modules node --import tsx scripts\check-ts-max-loc.ts --max 500`
- `node scripts\root-dependency-ownership-audit.mjs --check`
- `NODE_PATH=D:\OpenClaw\node_modules node --import tsx scripts\generate-base-config-schema.ts --check`
- `node scripts\run-vitest.mjs test\scripts\check-runtime-packet-lint.test.ts src\agents\tools\sessions-spawn-tool.test.ts src\agents\tools\cron-tool.runtime-packet.test.ts test\scripts\prompt-snapshots.test.ts` - 5 files / 99 tests passed.
- `node node_modules\oxfmt\bin\oxfmt --check --threads=1 scripts\check-runtime-packet-lint.mjs scripts\generate-prompt-snapshots.ts src\agents\tools\cron-tool.runtime-packet.test.ts src\agents\tools\runtime-packet-lint.ts src\agents\tools\sessions-spawn-tool.test.ts test\helpers\agents\happy-path-prompt-snapshots.ts test\scripts\prompt-snapshots.test.ts scripts\lib\ts-max-loc-baseline.json`
- `git diff --check`
- `git diff --check origin/main HEAD`

Earlier targeted Vitest batches for the broader cron/runtime-packet surface also passed in low-worker batches: 11 files / 309 tests total. GitHub currently reports the PR mergeable against the newer base `4859edd9f83d5a069fc6c1a05d2e6f53f660484e` after subsequent main movement.

## Real behavior proof
- Behavior or issue addressed: Side-effectful delegated cron `agentTurn` runtime packets are exposed in schema, enforced before execution, and stripped from cron add/update forwarding, including the accepted `executionPacket`, `runtimePacket`, and `boundedExecutionPacket` aliases.
- Real environment tested: Local Windows OpenClaw worktree `D:\OpenClaw-state\worktrees\agent-system-optimization-port-20260514`, local validation head `4ea6acc0f5cd92d728122fe496ac42ae2a9b2452`, PR head `b331ba3d47966b8edfe45f04c3329864b3fe01b4`, matching tree `eb730bee3d8d24be7550976998f6649ff074a48b`, with the existing dependency cache at `D:\OpenClaw\node_modules`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran `NODE_PATH=D:\OpenClaw\node_modules node --import tsx --input-type=module -` with an inline probe importing `./src/agents/tools/cron-tool.ts`, creating `createCronTool`, invoking `cron.add` and `cron.update` for `executionPacket`, `runtimePacket`, and `boundedExecutionPacket`, then inspecting the exact params forwarded to the gateway call boundary.
- Evidence after fix (terminal capture / copied live output): Terminal transcript from the local Windows OpenClaw worktree:

```text
$ NODE_PATH=D:\OpenClaw\node_modules node --import tsx --input-type=module -
{
  "remoteHead": "b331ba3d47966b8edfe45f04c3329864b3fe01b4",
  "remoteTree": "eb730bee3d8d24be7550976998f6649ff074a48b",
  "localHead": "4ea6acc0f5cd92d728122fe496ac42ae2a9b2452",
  "localTree": "eb730bee3d8d24be7550976998f6649ff074a48b",
  "treeMatchesPrHead": true,
  "aliases": [
    "executionPacket",
    "runtimePacket",
    "boundedExecutionPacket"
  ],
  "callCount": 6,
  "methods": [
    "cron.add",
    "cron.update",
    "cron.add",
    "cron.update",
    "cron.add",
    "cron.update"
  ],
  "forwardedAliasHits": [],
  "allAliasesStripped": true
}
Config warnings:
- plugins: plugin: OpenClaw source checkout detected without pnpm workspace dependencies; run `pnpm install` from the repo root so bundled plugins can load package-local dependencies.
```

- Observed result after fix: The live output shows the PR head tree exactly matches the local validation tree; all three accepted packet aliases were exercised through both `cron.add` and `cron.update`; no alias remained at the forwarded top level, payload, patch, or patch payload level, and `allAliasesStripped` was `true`.
- What was not tested: Full clean `pnpm install`, `pnpm tsgo:extensions`, and `pnpm tsgo:extensions:test` were not rerun in this port worktree because registry/native optional package availability remains blocked for `@typescript/native-preview-win32-x64@7.0.0-dev.20260511.1`; full local revalidation after the later remote base advance to `4859edd9f83d5a069fc6c1a05d2e6f53f660484e` was not run because Git HTTPS fetch/push was unavailable, but GitHub currently reports the PR mergeable against that base.

## Notes
- Full package reinstall in the clean worktree was previously blocked by registry/network `ECONNRESET`; direct underlying checks were run against the existing main worktree dependency cache.
- Running the full 11-file Vitest target set in one process on this Windows worktree previously hit Vitest worker OOM; the same files were rerun in smaller low-worker batches and passed.
- This PR does not modify constitution, governance rules, or durable memory.
target.author: chkh6
